items.title: More people have been arrested over the Reflecting Pool than the Epstein files
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: UN pauses Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan after cargo ship attacked
items.dek: The ship was reportedly struck by an "unknown projectile" near Oman but no casualties were reported.
items.body: The ship was reportedly struck by an "unknown projectile" near Oman but no casualties were reported.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Women alleging rape and sexual assault in France call to abolish statute of limitations
items.dek: More than 50 women are calling for the abolition of the statute of limitations which they say has prevented them seeking justice.
items.body: More than 50 women are calling for the abolition of the statute of limitations which they say has prevented them seeking justice.
items.author: IriLine Desk
